title: 8 ffmpeg Commands for Everyday Media Tasks
summary: Save time on common video and audio work with ffmpeg commands for conversion, trimming, resizing, screenshots, GIF previews, audio extraction, compression, and subtitles.
verification_setup: Replace the example media file names before running the commands.
Run the commands from a writable directory.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/ffmpeg_commands_for_everyday_media_tasks.sh with real local media files.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Replace the example media file names with local files and run the commands from a writable directory.
